creator: dyfet@ostel.com
text:
A completely new set of ports have been created for ccscript and Common C++.  These build differently and install complete documentation.
These should replace prior versions.  The "ports" files in question are:

ftp://www.voxilla.org/pub/freebsd/ports/CommonC++-1.4.1.ports
ftp://www.voxilla.org/pub/freebsd/ports/ccscript-1.4.1.ports

I am also using this site for master site of all my future ports,
with tarballs under ftp://www.voxilla.org/pub/freebsd/tarball, since earlier tarball versions that may match a prior distributed port occassionaly get wiped on the GNU master sites.

I will also be replacing ccaudio, ccrtp, vpb2, and bayonne with new
ports soon.
